title: Presidential official proposes 'public dividends' from AI
description: The presidential chief of staff for policy on Tuesday proposed introducing public dividends to distribute the "fruits" from an artificial intelligence (AI)-driven economic boom.
content:

title: What China wants from Trump
description: China wants U.S. concessions on artificial intelligence, export markets, and Taiwan to come from this week's summit with President Donald Trump.
content: Xi is also expected to press for concessions on Taiwan, the most sensitive issue in Chinese foreign policy. China wants changes in U.S. language regarding support for Taiwan. Xi will likely seek an explicit statement that the U.S. opposes Taiwanese i... [1724 chars]

title: India cannot afford to be just an AI consumer: Sarvam AI’s Pratyush Kumar
description: India needs to develop its own large-scale artificial intelligence models. Sarvam AI plans to train a trillion-parameter AI model soon. This move is crucial for India to lead in AI development. Owning foundational AI models will drive economic and technological growth. India must invest in computing infrastructure and research talent.

title: cleared AI risk tool could help guide breast cancer therapy
description: The FDA has cleared the first AI test to help breast cancer patients decide on chemotherapy. The multimodal artificial intelligence (MMAI) tool, known as ArteraAI, could help low risk patients avoid the risks of potentially unnecessary chemotherapy.
content:
According to estimates from 2022, about 2.3 million females around the world were newly diagnosed with breast cancer.
Depending on the type of breast cancer, treatment options may include chemotherapy.
Different types and stages of breast cancer have... [6199 chars]

title: Georgia wrestles with how to govern AI without stifling innovation
description: Most Georgians think the government should do more to regulate artificial intelligence, according to the latest Atanta Journal-Constitution poll.
